component.name: jmux
component.summary: Terminal multiplexer for AI coding agents

description.p: jmux is a GTK4/libadwaita terminal multiplexer built with Rust and Ghostty. It combines terminal workspaces, an integrated WebKit browser with 120+ automation commands, and a rich socket API for AI agent control.

ul.li: Split panes with directional focus and zoom
Integrated browser with Playwright-style automation API
Shell integration for CWD, git branch, PR status, and port detection
Remote SSH workspaces with auto-bootstrap and SOCKS5 proxy
Command palette with 50+ commands and fuzzy search
V1 text (60 commands) and V2 JSON-RPC (210+ methods) socket protocols

description.p: Security hardening, GLAD shared library fix for AUR builds, optional webkit feature gate.
First public release — full feature parity with macOS jmux 0.62.0.
